nasb.text: So Joseph settled his father and his brothers and gave them a possession in the land of Egypt, in the best of the land, in the land of Rameses, as Pharaoh had ordered.

esv.text: Then Joseph settled his father and his brothers and gave them a possession in the land of Egypt, in the best of the land, in the land of Rameses, as Pharaoh had commanded.

cnv.text: 約瑟照著法老的吩咐安置他的父親和兄弟們，把蘭塞地，就是埃及地最好的地方，給他們作產業。

ccb.text: 约瑟遵照法老之命把埃及最好的地方——兰塞境内的土地给他父亲和弟兄们居住，作他们的产业。

csbs.text: 约瑟照着法老的吩咐让他的父亲和兄弟们安置下来，又把埃及地最好的地方，就是兰塞境内的地，给他们作产业。
